meaning: n.(=nursling)奶妈养育的婴幼儿,养子
examples: Methods All nurseling under 3 years were examined with color Doppler high frequency ultrasound.
OBJECTIVE To explore the clinical effect of Medilac-Vita with Smecta treating diarrhea of nurseling.
Objective To investigate the prevalence rate of congenital hydronephrosis in 5067 nurseling under 3 years.
